title: adhatoda palustris
intro: Adhatoda palustris, also known as Marsh Alternanthera or Nilgiri Chrysopogon, is a type of plant native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Adhatoda palustris include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Adhatoda palustris can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to make various remedies, including oils and powders.
